{{Expand}}

{{Infobox location
| name = Li clan main gate
| introduced = cradle-09-bloodline
}}

== Bloodline ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|The [[Li clan]] has a main [[gate]].<ref name="cradle-09-bloodline-c13">''Bloodline'', chapter 13</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Locations]]
[[Category:Bloodline]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle locations]]
[[Category:Structures]]
